requirement_topic.en: Energy Efficiency / Energy Label for Lighting （Cameroon energy programme）
requirement_topic.zh: 照明能效/能效标识（喀麦隆能效计划）
requirement_topic.zht: 照明能效/能效標識（喀麥隆能效計劃）

summary.en: Cameroon does not operate an EU-style horizontal Ecodesign regulation with binding minimum efficacy, CRI, lifetime, and power-factor thresholds enforced as a market-access gate. Instead, energy efficiency for lighting is addressed through national energy programmes / energy-labelling initiatives （commonly developed with ECOWAS/Central-African regional support and international donor programmes） that may set an energy label and/or minimum performance for lamps. Where such a programme applies, lamps may need to carry an energy label and meet a minimum efficacy/quality tier before sale. This is far less prescriptive than EU Ecodesign （Reg EU 2019/2020） and there is no EPREL-equivalent mandatory product registry. Any efficacy/quality testing usually references the IEC performance standards adopted as Normes Camerounaises （e.g. IEC 62612 for self-ballasted LED lamp performance）. French labelling is expected, and the in-country importer handles compliance at import. Verify with ANOR / the relevant energy authority whether an energy-label or minimum-performance requirement currently applies to the specific lamp/luminaire type.
summary.zh: 喀麦隆不实行欧盟式横向生态设计法规，亦不以具约束性的最低能效、显色指数、寿命及功率因数阈值作为市场准入门槛。照明能效改由国家能效计划/能效标识倡议（通常在西非/中非区域支持及国际捐助计划下制定）处理，可能为灯设定能效标识及/或最低性能。在此类计划适用时，灯在销售前可能须贴附能效标识并达到最低能效/质量档次。这远不如欧盟生态设计（法规 EU 2019/2020）具规定性，且没有 EPREL 等效的强制产品注册库。任何能效/质量检测通常引用被采用为喀麦隆标准的 IEC 性能标准（如自镇流 LED 灯性能的 IEC 62612）。须提供法语标识，由在地进口商在进口环节负责合规。请向 ANOR/相关能源主管部门核实具体灯/灯具类型当前是否适用能效标识或最低性能要求。
summary.zht: 喀麥隆不實行歐盟式橫向生態設計法規，亦不以具約束性的最低能效、顯色指數、壽命及功率因數閾值作為市場准入門檻。照明能效改由國家能效計劃/能效標識倡議（通常在西非/中非區域支持及國際捐助計劃下制定）處理，可能為燈設定能效標識及/或最低性能。在此類計劃適用時，燈在銷售前可能須貼附能效標識並達到最低能效/質量檔次。這遠不如歐盟生態設計（法規 EU 2019/2020）具規定性，且沒有 EPREL 等效的強制產品注冊庫。任何能效/質量檢測通常引用被採用為喀麥隆標準的 IEC 性能標準（如自鎮流 LED 燈性能的 IEC 62612）。須提供法語標識，由在地進口商在進口環節負責合規。請向 ANOR/相關能源主管部門核實具體燈/燈具類型當前是否適用能效標識或最低性能要求。

standards_or_laws: Cameroon national energy-efficiency / energy-labelling programme for lighting （where applicable）
NC/IEC 62612 — Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services — Performance requirements （IEC performance standard adopted as Norme Camerounaise where applicable）

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB 30255-2019 （Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires）, which defines three energy-efficiency grades: Grade 1 ≥90 lm/W, Grade 2 ≥80 lm/W, Grade 3 ≥70 lm/W, with Grade 3 the minimum for CN market entry. The China Energy Label （CEL） registration is mandatory for GB 30255-covered products, administered by SAMR/CQC/CECP. China therefore enforces a binding minimum efficacy tier plus a mandatory energy label as a market-access condition — a stronger and more uniform regime than Cameroon's energy programme.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB 30255-2019（LED 室内照明产品能效要求），规定三个能效等级：1 级 ≥90 lm/W、2 级 ≥80 lm/W、3 级 ≥70 lm/W，3 级为中国市场准入最低要求。中国能效标识（CEL）注册对 GB 30255 涵盖产品为强制要求，由市场监管总局（SAMR）/CQC/CECP 管理。因此中国以约束性最低能效档次加强制能效标识作为市场准入条件——其制度比喀麦隆能效计划更强、更统一。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB 30255-2019（LED 室內照明產品能效要求），規定三個能效等級：1 級 ≥90 lm/W、2 級 ≥80 lm/W、3 級 ≥70 lm/W，3 級為中國市場准入最低要求。中國能效標識（CEL）注冊對 GB 30255 涵蓋產品為強制要求，由市場監管總局（SAMR）/CQC/CECP 管理。因此中國以約束性最低能效檔次加強制能效標識作為市場准入條件——其制度比喀麥隆能效計劃更強、更統一。

standards_or_laws: GB 30255-2019 — Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires （SAC/SAMR）
China Energy Label （CEL） scheme — administered by SAMR/CQC/CECP

gap.en: This is a reverse gap compared with the EU: Cameroon's lighting energy regime is weaker and less uniform than China's, not stronger. China enforces a binding minimum efficacy （Grade 3 ≥70 lm/W） plus mandatory CEL registration, whereas Cameroon relies on national energy programmes / labelling initiatives that may or may not set a binding minimum for a given product, and there is no EPREL-equivalent mandatory registry. Practical points for export: （1） a product already meeting China's CEL/GB 30255 efficiency tier will generally meet or exceed any Cameroon energy-programme threshold; （2） where a Cameroon energy label applies, the label artwork and any required minimum-performance evidence must be prepared in French, typically against the adopted IEC performance standard （e.g. IEC 62612）; （3） the Chinese CEL is not the Cameroon label — it does not transfer. Confirm with ANOR / the energy authority whether an energy label or minimum-performance requirement currently applies to the specific product before shipment.
gap.zh: 与欧盟相比这是反向差距：喀麦隆的照明能效制度比中国更弱、更不统一，而非更强。中国强制约束性最低能效（3 级 ≥70 lm/W）加强制 CEL 注册，而喀麦隆依靠国家能效计划/标识倡议，对特定产品是否设定约束性最低值并不确定，且无 EPREL 等效强制注册库。出口实务要点：（1）已达到中国 CEL/GB 30255 能效档次的产品通常能满足或超过喀麦隆任何能效计划阈值；（2）在喀麦隆能效标识适用时，标识设计及任何所需最低性能证据须以法语准备，通常依据所采用的 IEC 性能标准（如 IEC 62612）；（3）中国 CEL 并非喀麦隆标识——不可沿用。出货前请向 ANOR/能源主管部门确认具体产品当前是否适用能效标识或最低性能要求。
gap.zht: 與歐盟相比這是反向差距：喀麥隆的照明能效制度比中國更弱、更不統一，而非更強。中國強制約束性最低能效（3 級 ≥70 lm/W）加強制 CEL 注冊，而喀麥隆依靠國家能效計劃/標識倡議，對特定產品是否設定約束性最低值並不確定，且無 EPREL 等效強制注冊庫。出口實務要點：（1）已達到中國 CEL/GB 30255 能效檔次的產品通常能滿足或超過喀麥隆任何能效計劃閾值；（2）在喀麥隆能效標識適用時，標識設計及任何所需最低性能證據須以法語準備，通常依據所採用的 IEC 性能標準（如 IEC 62612）；（3）中國 CEL 並非喀麥隆標識——不可沿用。出貨前請向 ANOR/能源主管部門確認具體產品當前是否適用能效標識或最低性能要求。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional / programme-dependent — no EU-style horizontal Ecodesign gate; an energy label and/or minimum performance may apply where a Cameroon energy programme covers the product type; no EPREL-equivalent registry
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory （minimum Grade 3） — GB 30255-2019 Grade 3 （≥70 lm/W） is the minimum for CN market entry; China Energy Label registration required

source.publisher: ANOR — Agence des Normes et de la Qualite （Cameroon）

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Cameroon has no EU-style horizontal Ecodesign market-access gate and no EPREL-equivalent registry; lighting energy efficiency is handled through national energy programmes / labelling initiatives that may set an energy label and/or minimum performance for some product types. This is a reverse gap — China's binding GB 30255 efficiency tier plus mandatory CEL is stronger, so a CEL-compliant product will generally satisfy any Cameroon energy threshold. Where a Cameroon energy label applies, prepare label artwork and performance evidence in French against the adopted IEC performance standard （e.g. IEC 62612）; the Chinese CEL does not transfer. Confirm applicability with ANOR / the energy authority before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 喀麦隆没有欧盟式横向生态设计市场准入门槛，也没有 EPREL 等效注册库；照明能效通过国家能效计划/标识倡议处理，可能为部分产品类型设定能效标识及/或最低性能。这是反向差距——中国约束性 GB 30255 能效档次加强制 CEL 更强，故符合 CEL 的产品通常能满足喀麦隆任何能效阈值。在喀麦隆能效标识适用时，请依据所采用的 IEC 性能标准（如 IEC 62612）以法语准备标识设计及性能证据；中国 CEL 不可沿用。出货前请向 ANOR/能源主管部门确认适用性。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 喀麥隆沒有歐盟式橫向生態設計市場准入門檻，也沒有 EPREL 等效注冊庫；照明能效通過國家能效計劃/標識倡議處理，可能為部分產品類型設定能效標識及/或最低性能。這是反向差距——中國約束性 GB 30255 能效檔次加強制 CEL 更強，故符合 CEL 的產品通常能滿足喀麥隆任何能效閾值。在喀麥隆能效標識適用時，請依據所採用的 IEC 性能標準（如 IEC 62612）以法語準備標識設計及性能證據；中國 CEL 不可沿用。出貨前請向 ANOR/能源主管部門確認適用性。

requirement_topic.en: Product Performance Quality （NC/IEC 62612 performance vs lifetime/CRI claims）
requirement_topic.zh: 产品性能质量（NC/IEC 62612 性能与寿命/显色指数声称）
requirement_topic.zht: 產品性能質量（NC/IEC 62612 性能與壽命/顯色指數聲稱）

summary.en: Beyond electrical safety, the ANOR conformity assessment / import inspection programme may check that lighting products meet basic performance and quality claims to protect consumers from substandard imports — a common driver of African market-surveillance action. Where applicable, performance is assessed against the IEC performance standard adopted as a Norme Camerounaise: NC/IEC 62612 （Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services — Performance requirements） covers luminous flux maintenance, lumen output, colour rendering （CRI/Ra）, colour consistency, rated life and switching cycle claims. Unlike EU Ecodesign, these are not binding horizontal market-access thresholds applied uniformly to all products; they function as the technical reference when performance/quality is examined within the conformity programme or an import inspection. French documentation of declared performance is expected, and the in-country importer handles the submission.
summary.zh: 除电气安全外，ANOR 合格评定/进口检验计划可能核查照明产品是否满足基本性能与质量声称，以保护消费者免受不合格进口产品之害——这是非洲市场监管行动的常见动因。在适用时，性能依据被采用为喀麦隆标准的 IEC 性能标准评定：NC/IEC 62612（普通照明用自镇流 LED 灯——性能要求）涵盖光通维持率、光输出、显色（CRI/Ra）、颜色一致性、额定寿命及开关循环声称。与欧盟生态设计不同，这些并非对所有产品统一适用的约束性横向市场准入阈值；其作用是在合格评定计划或进口检验中审查性能/质量时的技术参照。须以法语记录所声称性能，由在地进口商负责提交。
summary.zht: 除電氣安全外，ANOR 合格評定/進口檢驗計劃可能核查照明產品是否滿足基本性能與質量聲稱，以保護消費者免受不合格進口產品之害——這是非洲市場監管行動的常見動因。在適用時，性能依據被採用為喀麥隆標準的 IEC 性能標準評定：NC/IEC 62612（普通照明用自鎮流 LED 燈——性能要求）涵蓋光通維持率、光輸出、顯色（CRI/Ra）、顏色一致性、額定壽命及開關循環聲稱。與歐盟生態設計不同，這些並非對所有產品統一適用的約束性橫向市場准入閾值；其作用是在合格評定計劃或進口檢驗中審查性能/質量時的技術參照。須以法語記錄所聲稱性能，由在地進口商負責提交。

standards_or_laws: NC/IEC 62612 — Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services — Performance requirements （adopted as Norme Camerounaise where applicable）
ANOR conformity assessment / import inspection programme — performance/quality verification for lighting

summary.en: China addresses LED lamp performance through GB/T 24908-2014 （Self-ballasted LED-lamps for general lighting — Performance requirements）, aligned with IEC 62612, and through the GB 30255 energy-efficiency grades plus the CEL. CRI, lifetime, and lumen-maintenance characteristics are commonly declared via GB/T performance testing for the Chinese market. Because GB/T 24908 and NC/IEC 62612 share the IEC 62612 base, the performance test content overlaps substantially.
summary.zh: 中国通过 GB/T 24908-2014（普通照明用自镇流 LED 灯——性能要求，与 IEC 62612 对齐）以及 GB 30255 能效等级加 CEL 处理 LED 灯性能。显色指数、寿命及光通维持特性通常经 GB/T 性能检测为中国市场声明。由于 GB/T 24908 与 NC/IEC 62612 共用 IEC 62612 基础，性能检测内容大量重叠。
summary.zht: 中國通過 GB/T 24908-2014（普通照明用自鎮流 LED 燈——性能要求，與 IEC 62612 對齊）以及 GB 30255 能效等級加 CEL 處理 LED 燈性能。顯色指數、壽命及光通維持特性通常經 GB/T 性能檢測為中國市場聲明。由於 GB/T 24908 與 NC/IEC 62612 共用 IEC 62612 基礎，性能檢測內容大量重疊。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 24908-2014 — Self-ballasted LED-lamps for general lighting — Performance requirements （aligned with IEC 62612）
GB 30255-2019 — Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires （SAC/SAMR）

gap.en: The technical performance content is largely harmonized because both Cameroon （NC/IEC 62612） and China （GB/T 24908） derive from IEC 62612, so a product with credible GB/T 24908 performance data should map cleanly to the Cameroon reference. The differences are: （1） in Cameroon performance/quality is examined inside the conformity assessment / import inspection rather than as a uniform binding horizontal threshold — checks target consumer protection against substandard imports and may be applied selectively; （2） declared performance documentation must be available in French; （3） GB/T performance reports are not automatically ANOR-accepted documents — IEC 62612-based test evidence acceptable to the ANOR programme is the practical route, often as part of the same submission as the safety conformity. Verify with ANOR whether performance/quality verification currently applies to the product type and which NC/IEC 62612 edition is adopted before shipment.
gap.zh: 技术性能内容基本协调，因为喀麦隆（NC/IEC 62612）与中国（GB/T 24908）均源自 IEC 62612，故具备可信 GB/T 24908 性能数据的产品应能清晰对应到喀麦隆参照。差异在于：（1）在喀麦隆，性能/质量于合格评定/进口检验内部审查，而非作为统一约束性横向阈值——核查针对保护消费者免受不合格进口之害，且可能选择性适用；（2）所声明性能文件须以法语提供；（3）GB/T 性能报告不自动成为 ANOR 接受文件——实际路径是采用 ANOR 计划可接受的基于 IEC 62612 的检测证据，通常与安全合格评定同批提交。出货前请向 ANOR 核实该产品类型当前是否适用性能/质量核查及所采用的 NC/IEC 62612 版本。
gap.zht: 技術性能內容基本協調，因為喀麥隆（NC/IEC 62612）與中國（GB/T 24908）均源自 IEC 62612，故具備可信 GB/T 24908 性能數據的產品應能清晰對應到喀麥隆參照。差異在於：（1）在喀麥隆，性能/質量於合格評定/進口檢驗內部審查，而非作為統一約束性橫向閾值——核查針對保護消費者免受不合格進口之害，且可能選擇性適用；（2）所聲明性能文件須以法語提供；（3）GB/T 性能報告不自動成為 ANOR 接受文件——實際路徑是採用 ANOR 計劃可接受的基於 IEC 62612 的檢測證據，通常與安全合格評定同批提交。出貨前請向 ANOR 核實該產品類型當前是否適用性能/質量核查及所採用的 NC/IEC 62612 版本。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional （within conformity programme） — performance/quality against adopted NC/IEC 62612 may be verified inside ANOR conformity assessment / import inspection; not a uniform binding horizontal threshold
mandatory_status.cn: Performance declared via GB/T 24908-2014; energy-efficiency grade and CEL are mandatory under GB 30255-2019

source.publisher: ANOR — Agence des Normes et de la Qualite （Cameroon）

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] In Cameroon, LED lamp performance/quality （lumen output, CRI, life, lumen maintenance） may be verified inside the ANOR conformity assessment / import inspection against the adopted NC/IEC 62612, primarily as consumer protection against substandard imports rather than as a uniform binding horizontal threshold like EU Ecodesign. The test content is largely harmonized with China's GB/T 24908 （shared IEC 62612 base）, so credible GB/T data maps cleanly, but GB/T reports are not automatically ANOR documents and declared performance must be in French. Confirm applicability and the adopted NC edition with ANOR before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在喀麦隆，LED 灯性能/质量（光输出、显色指数、寿命、光通维持）可在 ANOR 合格评定/进口检验内部依据所采用的 NC/IEC 62612 核查，主要作为保护消费者免受不合格进口之害，而非像欧盟生态设计那样的统一约束性横向阈值。检测内容与中国 GB/T 24908 基本协调（共用 IEC 62612 基础），故可信 GB/T 数据可清晰对应，但 GB/T 报告不自动成为 ANOR 文件，且所声明性能须为法语。出货前请向 ANOR 确认适用性及所采用的 NC 版本。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在喀麥隆，LED 燈性能/質量（光輸出、顯色指數、壽命、光通維持）可在 ANOR 合格評定/進口檢驗內部依據所採用的 NC/IEC 62612 核查，主要作為保護消費者免受不合格進口之害，而非像歐盟生態設計那樣的統一約束性橫向閾值。檢測內容與中國 GB/T 24908 基本協調（共用 IEC 62612 基礎），故可信 GB/T 數據可清晰對應，但 GB/T 報告不自動成為 ANOR 文件，且所聲明性能須為法語。出貨前請向 ANOR 確認適用性及所採用的 NC 版本。
